summary: Spec review allow for HARBOR-234 at head 461c3682393561ace3597eaafdef81d6f7ffe490. Reviewed full suite path and confirmed the direct runtime API spoofing fix remains inside the existing HARBOR-234 spec: Harbor exposes session-scoped site resource facts and write-precheck facts with public/redacted refs only, no live account/profile/production page claim, and no submit/publish/send/save action. Validation consumed pnpm typecheck, pnpm test 32/32, git diff --check, suite evidence validate, and loom build pass on 2026-07-09T10:35Z.
reviewed_validation_summary: 2026-07-09T10:32Z UTC build validation on branch `work/harbor-234-site-runtime-facts` after direct runtime API spoofing fix: `pnpm typecheck` passed, `pnpm test` passed with 32/32 tests, `pnpm smoke:runtime` passed in fixture mode, and `git diff --check` passed. Earlier Loom checks passed for `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --item HARBOR-234 --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item HARBOR-234 --json`, `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item HARBOR-234 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-234 --json`, and `loom build --target . --item HARBOR-234 --build-evidence .loom/specs/HARBOR-234/build-evidence.json --json`. Read-only review lanes reported and the main controller fixed two provenance findings: HTTP write-precheck accepted caller-supplied page facts, and public `HarborRuntime.getWritePrecheckFacts` accepted caller-supplied URL/title/summary/locator for direct consumers. Downstream App/Core E2E remains outside HARBOR-234 scope until Core consumes this API and the user authorizes any real account/profile/production page action. This validation did not use real accounts, browser profiles, production pages, submit/publish/send/save actions, hosted browser, marketplace, bulk collection, or risk-control bypass.
